projects.name: Groupie Tracker
projects.about:
Groupie Tracker is a web application that allows music enthusiasts to explore and discover information about various artists and bands.

Our platform provides detailed data on artists' creation dates, first album releases, members, and upcoming concert locations.

With an interactive interface, users can search, filter, and visualize artist information, making it easier than ever to stay up to date with their favorite musicians and discover new ones.

projects.name: Ascii Art
projects.about:
This is a program that takes a string and outputs it in an art form out of ASCII characters.This project handles an input with numbers, letters, spaces, special characters and 
.This project is developed using the Go language.
This Project was developed during Module phase at zone01 Kisumu cohort

projects.name: Ascii Web
projects.about: The ASCII Art Web is a program written to generate ASCII art from a given string or its specified substring and writes the output to a webpage.
